texto: Then I probably fainted. The woman at the registration desk managed to put on a sympathetic expression afterward, as if she wanted to ask, "What are you going to do now?" I told her not to worry, I was really leaving, I was going home.But go home where? Without my children I no longer had a home.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Barbara Honigmann: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “Then I probably fainted. The woman at the registration desk managed to put on a sympathetic expre…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, children, home pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de home.
